checks: Fifteen parser, history, archive, division-discovery, and live-explorer regression tests pass
All eight official 2026 participant PDFs parse as eight-column registration reports and deduplicate to 3,812 participants
Registration participants remain searchable even before a qualifying score is published
All eight Round 1 qualifying reports parse with arithmetic validation for game, block, cumulative total, and average
Registration-only profiles display squad, qualifying event, waiver status, and official participant-report link without inventing standings
Published result profiles display division-specific rank, field size, scores, source timestamp, and report links
State participant lists follow the selected division and show pending labels for registration-only rows
2025 is limited to the verified U18 Boys archive and automatically locks the division selector to U18 Boys
Shareable URLs preserve year, division, state, and bowler identity
Selected U12 Girls profile updates hero, statistics, results status, state title, and URL while hiding U18B-only cut and comparison sections
Selected registration-only U18 Boys profile hides every score-dependent dashboard section
A 390 by 844 phone viewport has no horizontal overflow and explorer controls collapse to one column
Browser console has no warnings or errors
Dashboard, explorer, registration, and validation JSON parse
JavaScript passes node --check and git diff passes whitespace validation
Updater preserves the fixed 2025 archive and uses conflict-safe live-data pushes
